nasb.text: But Jews came from Antioch and Iconium, and having won over the crowds, they stoned Paul and dragged him out of the city, supposing him to be dead.

esv.text: But Jews came from Antioch and Iconium, and having persuaded the crowds, they stoned Paul and dragged him out of the city, supposing that he was dead.

cnv.text: 但有些猶太人，從安提阿、以哥念來，挑唆群眾，用石頭打保羅，以為他死了，就拖到城外去。

ccb.text: 有些犹太人从安提阿和以哥念来煽动民众，他们用石头打保罗，以为他死了，就把他拖到城外。

csbs.text: 但有些犹太人从安提阿和以哥念来到，挑唆众人，用石头砸了保罗。他们以为他已经死了，就把他拖到城外。
